obligations.rule: The function must return true for valid credit card numbers matching any provider when no provider is specified.
obligations.why: This is the baseline behavior when no options are provided.

obligations.rule: The function must return true for valid credit card numbers matching the specified provider.
obligations.why: The `provider` option allows filtering by specific card providers.

obligations.rule: The function must throw an error if an invalid provider is specified.
obligations.why: The function must validate the `provider` option against the documented list.

obligations.rule: The function must reject strings with invalid formats, such as containing non-numeric characters or incorrect lengths.
obligations.why: Credit card numbers must conform to specific format rules.

obligations.rule: The function must sanitize input by removing spaces and dashes before validation.
obligations.why: The implementation explicitly sanitizes the input before applying regex checks.

obligations.rule: The function must correctly handle early returns for invalid formats or mismatched providers.
obligations.why: The implementation uses early returns to optimize validation.

obligations.rule: The function must call `isLuhnValid` for valid-looking numbers after regex checks pass.
obligations.why: The implementation relies on Luhn algorithm validation as a final step.

obligations.rule: Cover the uncovered ternary false branch at line 25 in the `isCreditCard` function.
obligations.why: The uncovered branch corresponds to the default behavior when the `options` parameter is not provided or is an empty object.

test_groups.title: Valid credit card numbers without provider
test_groups.rationale: Covers baseline behavior for valid and invalid credit card numbers without specifying a provider.

test_groups.title: Valid credit card numbers with specific provider
test_groups.rationale: Tests provider-specific validation for valid and invalid credit card numbers.

test_groups.title: Invalid provider option
test_groups.rationale: Ensures the function throws an error for invalid providers.

test_groups.title: Sanitization of input
test_groups.rationale: Tests the function's ability to handle and sanitize input with spaces and dashes.

test_groups.title: Luhn algorithm validation
test_groups.rationale: Ensures the function correctly validates numbers using the Luhn algorithm.

test_groups.title: Default options behavior (uncovered ternary false branch)
test_groups.rationale: Targets the uncovered ternary false branch at line 25 by testing the default behavior when no `options` parameter is provided.
